candidate_summary: KIMCHI-PIPELINE: 4-stage temperature-controlled LLM training pipeline (pre-filter/broad-pretrain/domain-FT/align-cool) with coupled data+LR+duration and explicit distribution shifts at boundaries.

evaluations.title: Mid-Training of LLMs Survey (2025/10)
evaluations.reason: Multi-phase annealing pipeline w/ data quality + optimization shifts = same coupled-phase formalism.

evaluations.title: Two-Phase Pretraining Enhancing LLM Accuracy (2024/12)
evaluations.reason: Two-phase data-selection+mix design directly overlaps coupled data+phase formalism.

evaluations.title: Survey LLM Mid-Training (2025/10)
evaluations.reason: Explicit controlled distribution shifts + mid-training curriculum = candidate's central novelty claim.

evaluations.title: ReMiT RL-Guided Mid-Training Iterative LLM Evolution (2026/02)
evaluations.reason: Iterative RL-guided refinement, not sequential 4-stage coupled pipeline.

evaluations.title: Modern LLM Training Stages Alignment Deployment (2026/04)
evaluations.reason: Directly enumerates pretraining-mid-training-SFT-RL stages = candidate's 4-stage framing.

evaluations.title: Post-Training 2026 GRPO DAPO RLVR
evaluations.reason: Three distinct post-training stages overlaps multi-stage sequential framing.

evaluations.title: What's the deal with mid-training? (Vintage Data)
evaluations.reason: Annealing + data-distribution shift role matches candidate's coupled phase boundary formalism.

evaluations.title: Continued Pretraining Language-Specific Adaptation (ROCm)
evaluations.reason: Playbook focuses on language adaptation, not 4-stage coupled pipeline.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: KIMCHI-PIPELINE's 4-stage coupled data+LR+duration pipeline with distribution-shift boundaries is substantially anticipated by mid-training surveys (2510.06826, 2510.23081), two-phase pretraining (2412.15285), the marktechpost pretrain-mid-SFT-RL stage taxonomy, and vintagedata's annealing+data-shift framing, yielding 6 hits >= 1.
